title: Fly Old Bird: Escape to the Ark
original_title: Fly Old Bird: Escape to the Ark
overview: Two elderly buddies, one with dementia and the other with heart issues, go on a road trip to the Ark Encounter. They face hurdles, exchange identities, strengthen their friendship while reaching their goal.
